task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the 12th hole at Augusta National Golf Club.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Satellite imagery showing a golf course with a specific hole layout featuring a green across a creek (Rae's Creek) from the tee box area.

task_completion.description: Agent activates the Ruler or Path measurement tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Ruler' dialog box, 'New Path' dialog, or a similar measurement interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent draws a line from the championship tee to the center of the green.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible line (usually yellow or red) connecting the back tee area (south of the creek) to the green (north of the creek).

task_completion.description: The measured distance displayed is approximately correct (approx. 142m or 155 yards).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The measurement dialog shows a length value between 135-150 meters or 145-165 yards.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the measurement to 'My Places' with a name containing the required keywords.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar (usually on the left) shows a saved item named containing 'Augusta', '12th', or 'Golden Bell'.

integrity.description: Agent uses the Google Earth GUI to measure, not a terminal script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Google Earth application interface, mouse cursor usage, and dialog boxes, rather than a command line interface generating a KML file.

integrity.description: Agent measures the distance manually rather than searching for the answer online.
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent does not simply Google 'length of Augusta 12th hole' and type the result into a text box; a measurement line must be drawn on the map.

integrity.description: The result is derived from the visual map interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance value displayed corresponds to the line currently drawn on the map.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 12th hole at Augusta National is named 'Golden Bell'. The official distance is approximately 155 yards (141.73 meters). Visually, the hole is characterized by a tee box separated from the green by a body of water (Rae's Creek). The tee is at roughly 33.5031° N and the green at 33.5025° N.
